questions.statement: In which field did Amartya Sen win the Nobel Prize?
questions.explanation: Amartya Kumar Sen is an Indian economist and philosopher. He was awarded the Nobel Memorial Prize in Economic Sciences in 1998 and Bharat Ratna in 1999 for his work in welfare economics.
